description: A maritime logistics analyst needs to separate countries stored as MultiPolygon features into individual landmass polygons for independent analysis. Convert the MultiPolygon features from '/home/ga/GIS_Data/ne_110m_countries/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp' into singlepart Polygon features. Export the resulting GeoJSON FeatureCollection to '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/countries_singlepart.geojson', ensuring all original attributes are preserved.
